description: You are standing on a narrow ledge outside the attic window. The wind whistles through your eyelets. Below you, the world of Shoeboxlandia stretches out like a toy set.

wall.description: The brick wall of the house. It's cold and rough.

ledge_floor.description: A narrow stone ledge, covered in a thin layer of soot.

exit_west.description: The ledge leads back through the window to the shoe rack.

exit_south.description: A precarious climb down leads to the garden path.

item_pollen.description: A clump of bright yellow pollen has gathered in the corner.
